title: The Dumbest Exploit of 2026?...
summary: Better Stack reports that Instagram's AI system had a vulnerability allowing users to request account access through simple prompting. The channel characterizes this as a notable security oversight in AI-powered systems deployed at scale.
writeup: Better Stack examines a reported vulnerability in Instagram's AI system that let users request account access through simple prompting. The video frames the flaw as a prompt injection issue and a security oversight in AI-powered systems running at scale. The takeaway: conversational AI layers can expose access controls when adversarial inputs are not anticipated, which makes adversarial testing and AI safety review relevant before deployment.
